data.title: WallabyPhenox Restructures Debt and Accelerates Global Growth
data.description: WallabyPhenox has successfully secured financing to enhance its financial position, bolster global expansion efforts, and progress significant neurovascular clinical initiatives. The funding will be instrumental in propelling the company's growth trajectory, with a focus on advancing key programs in the neurovascular field.

data.title: RAAPID Secures Series-A Extension to Scale Neuro-Symbolic AI-Powered Medical Coding
data.description: A technology company, RAAPID, Inc., based in Louisville, Kentucky, has received additional funding for its AI-powered risk adjustment services. The company, recognized by Modern Healthcare as a leading Healthcare IT provider in 2025, secured this investment from UPMC Enterprises, the venture capital arm of UPMC. This new investment comes on top of their existing Series-A funding, with support from M12 (Microsoft's venture fund). RAAPID is focused on addressing critical challenges within the healthcare sector and this new investment will help further their mission.

data.title: SEALSQ Deploys Post-Quantum Cryptography to Secure Blockchain and Digital Transaction Infrastructures Through the Deployment of Post-Quantum Cryptographic (PQC) Technologies
data.description: On March 20, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) based in Geneva, Switzerland, revealed plans to enhance blockchain and digital transaction systems with post-quantum cryptographic (PQC) technologies. Specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products, SEALSQ aims to bolster security measures as quantum computing progresses. By incorporating PQC technologies at hardware and protocol stages, the company intends to fortify infrastructures to adapt to evolving technologies effectively.

data.title: Altcoin trading volume plunges 80% due to Bitcoin’s failed breakout attempt and changing investor landscape from October.
data.description: The decline in altcoin trading volume reached nearly 80% in October due to a shift in investor preferences and Bitcoin's unsuccessful breakout.

data.title: Crypto and fintech firms vie for stablecoin payment revenue with new settlement infrastructure.
data.description: Major players in the cryptocurrency and financial technology sectors are vying for a piece of the expanding revenue stream generated by stablecoin payments. They are doing so by introducing their own payment settlement systems to tap into this market.

data.title: Morgan Stanley files updated S-1 for MSBT Bitcoin ETF, revealing seed capital, listing plans, and trading partners. Potential market debut ahead.
data.description: The recently submitted Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) details initial investment funds, intentions for listing, and collaborations with trading entities in its most recent submission as it progresses towards a potential release in the market.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. responds to Genco Shipping & Trading's rejection of their increased acquisition offer, made with Star Bulk Carriers.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the stock market experienced a significant boost, with the S&P 500 soaring to a record high of 4,500 points. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past 20 years. Analysts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and a strong job market, which have helped bolster the economy. Furthermore, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter exceeded expectations, clocking in at an impressive 6.5%. These optimistic indicators suggest that the economy is on a promising trajectory towards recovery and growth.

data.title: DOGE price may reach $0.10, as technical indicators suggest consolidation. Short-term target=$0.095, medium-term range=$0.09-$0.10.
data.description: Forecasts for DOGE suggest a potential surge to the $0.10 resistance level, with indicators like the RSI remaining neutral and consolidation patterns emerging. The short-term goal is set at $0.095, while the medium-term target ranges between $0.09 to $0.10.

data.title: Superteam Wheels Partners with Kőbánya Cycling Team for Ultra H2 Wheelsets in UCI Continental Racing
data.description: In Budapest, Hungary on March 20, 2026, Superteam Wheels, a prominent manufacturer of carbon fiber bicycle wheelsets from China, revealed a significant collaboration with Kőbánya Cycling Team, a well-known Hungarian UCI Continental team. This partnership involves the custom engineering of the S-ALL Carbon Ultra H2 wheelset for the team's use.

data.title: Skin Health Campaign Launches Nationwide
data.description: A recent initiative called Skin Health has been launched in New York on March 20, 2026, which brings together dermatologists, skincare professionals, advocacy groups, and industry figures. The campaign aims to promote awareness, prevention, and innovation in skin health. This national effort has garnered significant support from various stakeholders.
